name: devops-tasks
description: Watch todo/ad-hoc_system_tasks: when a file arrives, the Junior DevOps agent carries out the instructions it contains, then the original is archived to completed/.

actions.name: execute
actions.prompt: An ad-hoc DevOps/system task was dropped into the queue as the file '${event_filename}'. Carry out the instructions described below. Report your plan, the exact commands, the outcome, and any follow-up.
